name: E2B Code Interpreter Sandbox
description: Enterprise AI agent cloud providing secure, sandboxed cloud environments for code execution. Enables agents to write and execute code in isolated microVMs. Supports Python, JavaScript, Ruby, C++ and any Linux-compatible language/framework. Used by 88% of Fortune 100 companies.
capabilities: Secure code execution (Python, JavaScript, Ruby, C++)
Computer use agents with virtual desktops
notes: Used by major AI companies and Fortune 100 enterprises. Firecracker-based microVMs for untrusted code execution. Sub-200ms startup times. Integrates with LangChain, LlamaIndex, Anthropic SDK, OpenAI SDK, Mistral, and Ollama.
